About Me

Akib Al Azad

Law Student & Aspiring Legal Professional

Hailing from Brahmanbaria, Bangladesh, I am currently pursuing my LL.B. (Honours) at the Bangladesh University of Professionals under the Faculty of Security & Strategic Studies — committed to building a career rooted in legal excellence and justice.

My academic journey has been defined by consistent excellence, earning a GPA of 5.00 in both SSC and HSC, and being recognized with the prestigious Upazila Best Student Award and a Board Scholarship for outstanding performance.

Location Brahmanbaria, Bangladesh
University BUP — Batch 11
Faculty Security & Strategic Studies
Interest Law, Photography, Journalism
